events.appearance_notes: High activity; Several adults were talking on the side of the road. There were many vehicles on the road. Later, two puppies appeared on the road. A black car hit the two puppies.
events.event_text: From 0.3s to 10.4s, several adults were talking on the side of the road. There were many vehicles on the road. Later, two puppies appeared on the road. A black car hit the two puppies.

events.appearance_notes: Observed event; Two puppies rolled on the road, then one of the dogs left the road and the other stopped in the middle of the road.
events.event_text: From 11.5s to 17.2s, two puppies rolled on the road, then one of the dogs left the road and the other stopped in the middle of the road.

events.appearance_notes: Observed event; The puppy in the middle of the road ran to the side of the road.
events.event_text: From 17.2s to 22.9s, the puppy in the middle of the road ran to the side of the road.

events.appearance_notes: Observed event; In the middle of the road on one side, a car with lights on stopped driving, and the lights shone on the puppy on the road in front.
events.event_text: From 14.5s to 20.6s, in the middle of the road on one side, a car with lights on stopped driving, and the lights shone on the puppy on the road in front.

events.appearance_notes: Observed event; The cars on the road continue to move forward slowly.
events.event_text: From 20.6s to 28.0s, the cars on the road continue to move forward slowly.
